message:
fix(mux): merge dialogs, add rsync options, fix show-all-tabs menu

- Combine download + folder sync into single download dialog with rsync options
- Add rsync options (exclude, delete, preview) to upload dialog
- Remove separate folder-transfer dialog
- Fix show-all-tabs menu item not working
